two 5 each. So
use the Rule 1 and put 3 dots in all the three Rasis. The same
rale applies to the second group too. There too the least
number is 3. So put this 3 in all the three Rasis. In the third
group too the same rale has application. Here too you have
to write 3 in all the three Rasis. In the case of the fourth group
Rule 2 is applicable as one of the houses viz. Pisces, is vacant.
So here no correction is necessary. What is the uett result ?
Pisces has zero, Cancer 5, Scorpio 4 and the rest 3 each. In
the case of the Moon's A.V. only Rule I is applicable. The
result is as follows in the 12 houses : 4, 4, 2, 2, 4, 4, 2, 2, 4,
4, 2, 2. Though 1 have given the result like tins, you will do
well to write the numbers in a chart. In the chart of Mars the
corrected figures are : 2, 1, 3, 2, 2, I, 3, 2, 2, 1, 3, 2. In Mer-
cury's A.V. you find Rule IV applicable in the first gtoup. So
you have to put zero in all the three places. The result, there-
